---
name: Feature Request
about: Propose a new feature or enhancement for this project
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem Statement
Is your feature request related to a problem? Please describe. (e.g. "I'm always frustrated when...")

## Proposed Solution
A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

## Alternative Solutions
A clear and concise description of any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Additional Context
Add any other context, mockup designs, or screenshots here.
